column1: Hey Sam, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details

haha hell yeah. alright we're talkin about it now and seeing what best play would be considering everything. we will have to get flights transferred and everything so i'll keep you updated. really appreciate you giving us this option my guy 🫡
Word brooo. just lmk I got you
is it occidental punta or occidental caribe punta?

Yoooo bro since Monday evening, once the US government lifted the travel advisory for Cancun, Grand Oasis and vendors on the ground are no longer allowing us a clean switch for travelers. everything out there is operating normally
At the moment we're currently offering our groups that are uncomfortable with going to Cancun a discounted Punta Cana trip at $400 per person for a 4 night stay

If the US was ever to restrict travel to Cancun again, we can look into the potential clean switch but at the moment all airlines and hotels are operating as normal and we have travelers and on site staff out there now. If you still want to look into Punta Cana let me know, would be happy to have y'all

I thought there was no travel ban? We would have decided Punta Cana earlier if we knew the only reason your company were offering a clean swap was because of a travel ban. This is really disappointing.

Yea there wasnt a travel ban, there was a Shelter in Place travel advisory going on through Monday early afternoon. at that time is when resorts were giving us the flexibility to make changes. Once that was lifted through the day and the US Embassy announced that all travel to Cancun is as normal, that flexibility was swept from under us

Without any government restrictions we don't have a leg to stand on when it comes to offering a clean swap. Things are locked in and confirmed with hotels, airlines, vendors, etc. But we are able to offer that discounted rate to Punta for our groups who are uncomfortable with Cancun and would like to switch. It would essentially be an entirely new reservation
